name: Sarah Chen
bio: Former international student from Taiwan. I've been through everything you're going through and would love to help!
bioZh: 来自台湾的前国际学生。我经历过你正在经历的一切，很乐意帮助你！

name: David Miller
bio: Local resident and teacher. I enjoy meeting people from different cultures and helping newcomers feel at home.
bioZh: 当地居民和教师。我喜欢认识来自不同文化的人，帮助新来的朋友感到温馨。

name: Lisa Wang
bio: PhD student in Computer Science. Happy to share tips about grad school life and navigating the US.
bioZh: 计算机科学博士生。很高兴分享研究生生活和美国生活的经验。

name: James Thompson
bio: Community volunteer for 5 years. I love cooking and often host dinner for international students.
bioZh: 社区志愿者5年。我喜欢做饭，经常为国际学生举办晚餐聚会。
